articles.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
articles.summary: The gambling industry expanded into yet another corner of daily life this week, with new betting markets launching on everything from weather patterns to celebrity baby names. When literally everything becomes bettable, prediction markets get both more data to work with and more noise to filter through.

articles.title: Northwestern Mutual: ‘Financially behind’ young investors turn to prediction markets, sports betting
articles.summary: Northwestern Mutual found that young investors who feel financially behind are increasingly turning to prediction markets and sports betting as alternative ways to build wealth. This signals prediction markets are attracting desperate money rather than informed capital, which could create more exploitable inefficiencies for sharp bettors.

articles.title: How prediction markets are spawning an entire trading industry
Cboe to launch prediction market contracts beyond binary bets, offering partial payouts
articles.summary: Cboe is expanding beyond simple yes/no prediction contracts to offer markets with partial payouts, likely meaning traders can cash out positions before final resolution. This marks a major exchange legitimizing prediction markets as sophisticated financial instruments rather than binary gambling, potentially attracting institutional money that demands more flexible risk management tools.

articles.title: PolyGun Acquires Polymarket Analytics in a Landmark Deal for the Prediction Market Industry
articles.summary: PolyGun just bought Polymarket Analytics in what's being called a major deal for the prediction markets space. The acquisition signals serious consolidation in the industry and could give PolyGun significantly better data tools to compete with the big players.

articles.title: Recession odds jump on Kalshi after oil tops $100
articles.summary: Oil prices cracked $100 per barrel, sending recession odds soaring on Kalshi as traders bet that energy shocks will tank the economy. Smart money is already positioning for Fed policy pivots and defensive plays, making energy-linked recession markets the new barometer for macro sentiment.

articles.title: What Price Will Crude Oil Reach By End Of March? Here's What Prediction Market Is Saying
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing in crude oil's trajectory through March, offering real-time odds on where the commodity will land as geopolitical tensions and supply disruptions shake global markets. These oil price bets matter because they're essentially proxy wagers on everything from inflation to recession risk, making them a key barometer for how traders view the broader economic picture.

articles.title: You Don't Need Polymarket to Make a Winning Bet. Just Buy This AI Stock.
articles.summary: Some AI stock is apparently such a sure thing that it beats betting on Polymarket's political markets. If prediction markets can't compete with basic stock picking, that's either a sign the markets are broken or this company is about to crater spectacularly.

articles.title: How to Prevent Insider Trading on Trump’s Wars
articles.summary: Trump's potential return to office raises serious concerns about government officials using advance knowledge of military actions to profit from defense stocks and related markets. Prediction markets betting on geopolitical events could face massive manipulation if insiders know about planned strikes, troop deployments, or diplomatic moves before they become public.

articles.title: Kalshi Teams Up With Brazil’s XP for First International Push
articles.summary: Kalshi is partnering with Brazilian financial giant XP to expand prediction markets internationally for the first time. This marks a huge step toward global adoption of regulated event betting, potentially opening up massive new liquidity pools and trading opportunities beyond US markets.

articles.title: Trump is the GOAT in GOP endorsements. Prediction markets say how he’ll decide Texas
articles.summary: Trump's endorsement power in Republican primaries remains unmatched, and prediction markets are betting he'll throw his weight behind a specific candidate in an upcoming Texas race. His track record of moving GOP primary odds by 20-30 points overnight makes any Trump endorsement signal pure gold for bettors watching Texas markets.

articles.title: Here’s what prediction markets say about SEC teams on the bubble
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing which SEC basketball teams will make the NCAA tournament, giving odds on bubble teams fighting for at-large bids. These markets offer sharper insights than committee speculation because real money forces more accurate assessments of each team's resume and remaining schedule strength.
